rules.title: Org policy: kernel core_pattern must not pipe to unapproved handlers
rules.rationale: core_pattern pipes run as root on every crash; unapproved handlers are a persistence vector and have leaked credentials in prior incidents.
rules.remediation: Set kernel.core_pattern to the approved handler in /etc/sysctl.d/50-org.conf

rules.title: Org policy: FIPS mode enabled on regulated hosts
rules.remediation: Boot with fips=1 after enabling the distribution FIPS profile.

rules.title: SysRq (suppressed by org)
rules.rationale: SysRq is required by our on-call hardware runbooks; risk accepted, ticket OPS-1234.
